game_info.title: Flappy Dunk
game_info.concept:
Tap to jump into as many hoops as possible. 

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/flappy-dunk/id1235581326

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Tap to jump into as many hoops as possible. 
Collect skins and achieve crazy challenges.
game_info.description: Flappy Dunk Challenge! Guide the bouncing basketball through the moving hoops. Time your jumps carefully to pass the ball downward through each hoop's net. Don't hit the ground, the ceiling, or miss a hoop, or it's game over! Earn points for every basket and look out for "Swish" bonuses for perfect shots.
game_info.controls:
- Space / Arrow Up: Jump (Apply upward force)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

TEST_1.test_description: Verify the player character can jump and attempt to clear the first hoop.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller detects the position of the first hoop relative to the player. It triggers the jump action when the player is below a target height above the hoop's rim, attempting to position the ball for a downward trajectory through the hoop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player successfully jumps, avoiding the ground, and either clears the hoop or collides with the rim/hoop structure, demonstrating physics interactions and control responsiveness. The game should not crash.

TEST_2.test_description: Stress test the physics and collision system with random inputs.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller sends random jump inputs at irregular intervals to create chaotic movement and forced collisions with rims, ground, and ceiling.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game handles multiple collisions and erratic movement without errors or physics glitches (like tunneling). Game Over state is triggered correctly upon failure conditions.
